channel.title: NAC Karagiannidis, C Mostert, C Hentschker, T Voshaar, J Malzahn, G Schillinger, J Klauber, U Janssens, G Marx, S Weber-Carstens, S Kluge, M Pfeifer, L Grabenhenrich, T Welte, R Busse | PlatCOVID

item.title: Case characteristics, resource use, and outcomes of 10 021 patients with COVID-19 admitted to 920 German hospitals: an observational study.
